title: Letter Treasure Hunt
description: A phonics treasure hunt where kids hear a target starting sound and tap the picture whose word begins with it.
learningGoals: Identify beginning sounds in familiar CVC words
Connect target letter tiles with real picture words
interactionModel: choose-one tap an object card after a spoken initial-sound prompt
feedbackModel: Correct object cards get sparkle SFX and spoken praise; misses wiggle gently, get a spoken nudge, and replay the prompt.

modes.title: Sound Treasure
modes.skill: initial-sound identification for b, s, m, c, p, and t

credits: Shared QLOBE Kids letter-tile and object-card art; emoji placeholder pirate flag. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
